notes: 26名球员 chinese_name、club_name_cn、球员级 source_log 已补齐；不可可靠核验字段保留null并写入gaps。

staff.coaching_style_fact_notes: 本地正式档案与Guardian首轮报道均记录美国在Pochettino下使用高压、纵向跑动和边路推进；首轮可见3-4-2-1/4-4-2防守转换与3-2-5进攻结构。

source_log.source: Guardian USA 4-1 Paraguay live report
source_log.notes: Used for first-round starts, minutes approximated from substitution timestamps, and match-shape facts.

source_log.source: Local USA 4-1 Paraguay post-match review
source_log.url: E:\worldcup\比赛\已完成比赛\小组赛\D组\2026-06-12_美国_4-1_巴拉圭_复盘.md

coach_summary.personnel_usage_note: 首轮用Freese、Freeman、Richards、Ream、Robinson、Dest、Adams、McKennie、Tillman、Pulisic、Balogun首发；半场用Berhalter换Pulisic，73分钟Weah/Pepi换Dest/Balogun，81分钟Reyna换Tillman。

team_style_facts: 首轮前场压迫和高节奏推进明显，Guardian称上半场压制力强。
进攻结构依赖Pulisic、Balogun、Tillman、McKennie之间的肋部连接和纵深跑动。
Robinson、Dest/Freeman提供边路宽度，进攻阶段可形成3-2-5。
Richards首轮后场传球稳定，公开报道记录83脚传球100%成功。
Pulisic小腿伤改变第二轮前场人员使用，Pepi顶替首发是最新可用性事实。
data.round1_match_shape: 美国 4-1 巴拉圭；Bobadilla乌龙、Balogun梅开二度、Reyna补时进球；Pulisic半场被换下，后续确认为小腿伤风险。

round1_player_usage.note: 首发，打满全场；被误判黄牌后经VAR撤销
首发，打满全场；59分钟黄牌
首发，上半场后被换下；参与前两球
首发，73分钟被换下；梅开二度

gaps_and_conflicts: 官方USSF最终名单页未在本次搜索中稳定返回；用Transfermarkt当前26人页与Stars and Stripes/Guardian报道交叉确认名单。
birth_date、官方caps/goals未逐人可靠核验，JSON保留null，待USSF/FIFA官方球员页统一补齐。
首轮分钟按Guardian换人时间近似标准化；官方补时分钟和完整技术统计需FIFA match centre后续复核。
评分只有公开报道片段：Balogun 10、Freese/Freeman/Ream/Robinson 6、Richards 7；其他保留null并以状态说明补充。
Pulisic小腿伤为当前最主要可用性风险；第二轮已缺阵，后续对土耳其需刷新。

source_log.source: Guardian/AP/SB Nation USA 2-0 Australia post-match verification

goals.note: Balogun cross/pass toward Pepi deflected by Burgess into own net.
Header/finish after deflected Sergino Dest shot; VAR confirmed.

round2_match_shape.data_quality: updated_from Guardian live/rating and AP match report; official FIFA event feed still recommended for exact stoppage-time minutes and official assist decision.

rating_policy_note: external_rating is nullable and only populated when a reliable same-match same-source rating is available; otherwise rating_source_status/rating_missing_note explain the gap and internal_rating_proxy may mirror form_status_1_5 as a non-external model helper.
internal_match_rating_policy_note: internal_match_rating_1_5 is an internal model score, 1.0-5.0 with one decimal, derived from verified match events and form_status_1_5; it is not an external rating.
